mapper.select: SELECT fp.id, fp.user_id, fp.name, fp.bio, fp.photo_url, fp.farm_description, u.email FROM farmer_profiles fp JOIN users u ON u.id = fp.user_id WHERE u.status = 'active' ORDER BY fp.name
SELECT fp.id, fp.user_id, fp.name, fp.bio, fp.photo_url, fp.farm_description, u.email, u.status FROM farmer_profiles fp JOIN users u ON u.id = fp.user_id WHERE fp.id = #{id}
SELECT fp.id, fp.user_id, fp.name, fp.bio, fp.photo_url, fp.farm_description, u.email, u.status FROM farmer_profiles fp JOIN users u ON u.id = fp.user_id WHERE fp.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO farmer_profiles (user_id, name, bio, photo_url, farm_description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{bio}, #{photoUrl}, #{farmDescription}) RETURNING id, user_id, name, bio, photo_url, farm_description
mapper.update: UPDATE farmer_profiles SET name = COALESCE(#{name}, name), bio = COALESCE(#{bio}, bio), photo_url = COALESCE(#{photoUrl}, photo_url), farm_description = COALESCE(#{farmDescription}, farm_description) WHERE user_id = #{userId} RETURNING id, user_id, name, bio, photo_url, farm_description
mapper.select: SELECT fp.id, fp.user_id, fp.name, fp.bio, fp.photo_url, fp.farm_description, u.email, u.status, u.created_at FROM farmer_profiles fp JOIN users u ON u.id = fp.user_id ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{userId}
